description: 190 - 22-04-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Christian Turner (former Political Director, FCDO)

participants.name: Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Christian Turner

text:
From: Christian Turnerl Personal

Sent: Tue 22/04/2025 5:57:42 AM (UTC)

To: Andrew Mitchell Personal ;Menna
Rawlings[ Personal : Peter
Mandelson Personal

Subject: Fw: Russia/Ukraine: London Talks 23 April

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

tba if not tracking the detail. CT

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: JCS
Sent: Monday, April 21, 2025 10:09 pm
To: Jonathan Allen
Cc: PUS Action ; DL DG Defence and Intelligence Private Office ; Christian Turner ; DL Political

Director Private Office ; Martin Harris * ; Lottie Surun ; JCS ; JCS
; Ben Fender ; Chris Allan ; Ros Eales ; Stephen Lillie ; Stephen Hickey ; DL EECAD Senior
Leadership Team ; JCS 4 JCS H JCS FE JCS
JCS
Subject: Russia/Ukraine: London Talks 23 April
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Jonathan

You and copy addressees might welcome a brief update on our plans to host the
next round of Russia/Ukraine talks in London on Wednesday (23 April), following
on from the meetings in Paris on Thursday.

We have moved fast over the Easter weekend to confirm that the meetings will take
place at 1 Carlton Gardens from c1 000 until 1600 on Wednesdav.

The structure of the day is coming together, but still a bit fluid, as we pin down
arrival details of some of the parties. =

On the policy, we have worked up, or commented on several supporting papers,

which we will share on a higher tier once finalised. 
There will be a media 
trail overnight Tuesday.
 OBE | EECAD region out-of-hours Senior Point of Contact | Eastern 
Europe and Central Asia Directorate| Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | 
Email: 
| Tel: 
 | Mobile: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Personal
Personal
Personal

JCS
